changeSet.author: shvets

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.task WHERE text IN ( 'List the main components of a graph.', 'What is a simple graph?', 'Explain the difference between a path and a walk.', 'What makes a graph directed?', 'What can an edge weight represent?', 'Give one example of a weighted graph application.', 'What data structure is commonly used in DFS?', 'What data structure is commonly used in BFS?', 'Name one key difference between DFS and BFS.', 'When is Dijkstra algorithm applicable?', 'What is the advantage of Bellman-Ford?', 'What does Floyd-Warshall compute?', 'What is a tree?', 'What strategy does Prim algorithm use?', 'How does Kruskal algorithm build MST?' );
